message:
test(cli): add comprehensive tests for config and random commands

Add test suites for the jfp CLI config and random command implementations:

config.test.ts - Tests for config get/set/list/reset commands:
- Setting boolean, number, and string values
- Getting values after setting them
- Rejecting invalid/unknown config keys with proper error codes
- Resetting config to defaults
- Ambiguous type handling (string preserved, not coerced)

random.test.ts - Tests for random prompt selection command:
- Basic output with JSON format verification
- Category filtering (--category flag)
- Proper error handling when no prompts match filter

Both test files use temp JFP_HOME directory for isolation and
mock console/process.exit for assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
